editableNewDialogue.text: optimize sentence: The dashboard shows an abnormal spike in latency since the last deployment.
“The dashboard has shown an unusual latency spike since the latest deployment.”
make it simpler and more direct
“Latency has spiked since the last deployment.”
optimize sentence: Please confirm whether the fix will be included in the next release or handled as a hotfix.
“Please confirm whether this will ship in the next release or be handled as a hotfix.”
translate to English and refine: 会议纪要需要在会后24小时内发出

Translation: “The meeting minutes need to be sent within 24 hours after the meeting.”

Refined: “Please send out the meeting minutes within 24 hours of the meeting.”

You can use: “share,” “circulate,” or “distribute.”
Example: “Please circulate the meeting minutes within 24 hours of the meeting.”
random question: what is the first line of the periodic table?
Hydrogen (H) and Helium (He). They’re the two elements in the first period (row) of the periodic table.
optimize sentence: iOS build failed again—looks like it's still using Xcode 15.0 on the runner; can you help me rewrite a short note to DevOps asking them to switch it back to 14.3?
"Our iOS build is failing again, and it looks like the runner is still using Xcode 15.0. Could you please switch it back to Xcode 14.3? Thanks."
之前我说为了适应外企工作来练翻译，但现在不是这个目的了。我主要是想把日常工作里的英文句子写得更地道（比如邮件/技术描述），不需要再给我翻译练习题。
明白，你现在的重点不是“做翻译题练外语”，而是把工作场景里的英文表达润色得更专业、更自然（邮件、会议纪要、技术描述等）。你直接把要发的句子/段落贴过来，我帮你改写并说明修改点。
